channel.title: SHDW-Stream Notifications (Private Fork)
channel.description: Private continuation updates and important notifications for trusted SHDW-Stream / P-Stream users

item.title: P-Stream Revival - Private Community Fork by ShadowCC / 2clickdeath
item.description:
The original P-Stream (pstream.mov) has been permanently discontinued and shut down as of early March 2026 due to anti-piracy pressure (ACE/MPA DMCA subpoena on Cloudflare, etc.). The original GitHub repos are archived/read-only, and official development has ended.
I'm 2clickdeath from ShadowCC. This is a private continuation/revival fork based on the last public code. The goal is to keep the core experience alive for a small, trusted group of users who value the ad-light, extension-powered streaming setup.
=== IMPORTANT WARNINGS - READ THIS FIRST ===
- This fork is now PRIVATE USE ONLY. It is not intended for public hosting, wide distribution, or large communities. Sharing links openly or hosting publicly may attract unwanted attention and lead to quick takedowns. Keep it among trusted friends only.
- The extension (or equivalent userscript) is now REQUIRED to play movies and TV shows. Without the updated extension active, the player will find NO sources and playback will fail completely. This is due to aggressive CORS blocks, domain protections, and scraper changes that the base site can no longer handle alone. The new extension will be distributed privately through trusted channels once ready.
- Desktop app and mobile PWA builds are DISCONTINUED until further notice. Browser-only use with the extension is the only supported method right now. We'll reassess later if conditions improve.
- Future updates will NO LONGER BE OPEN-SOURCE. For obvious reasons (to avoid automated DMCA scanners, repo takedowns, and legal pressure that killed the original), releases will be shared privately (binaries, patches, instructions) via secure/closed channels only. No public GitHub source after this point.
Roadmap highlights (private development focus): - Stronger login/password protection + optional 2FA/passkeys with encrypted sync to resist mass data grabs. - Decentralized backend choices + self-hosting guides + fallback proxies for resilience. - Better source handling: auto-failover, new private providers, Turnstile/Cloudflare bypass improvements. - Privacy upgrades: scraper obfuscation, no telemetry, Tor/I2P hints, minimal account needs. - Feature restoration: watch parties, subtitle tools, themes, bookmarks, auto-skip, etc. - Community input still welcome privately: send source ideas, old archives, or patches through trusted contacts.
This setup is designed to be much harder to take down - private distribution, extension reliance, no public repo/source exposure.
If you have old data exports from pstream.mov, save them - migration should still work. For questions, extension access, or to contribute privately, reach out in closed piracy communities or known trusted channels (avoid public posts).
Free streaming continues quietly for those who know. Stay safe. 🏴‍☠️
(First private release candidate expected in the coming weeks.)
